summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Enhanced Class Schedule system in CoachCenter. All 9 features verified and working correctly via pytest (backend) and Playwright (frontend).

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing DialogDescription for accessibility - not user-facing

day_selection_checkboxes.description: All 7 day checkboxes (Mon-Sun) present and functional. Toggling days updates schedule_details and generates schedule string.

start_end_time_pickers.description: Start Time and End Time input fields work correctly with clock icon styling. Times saved to schedule_details.

start_end_date_fields.description: Start Date and End Date fields work with native date pickers. Date range displayed in Classes table.

auto_generate_calendar_events.description: Creating class with schedule_details, start_date, and end_date auto-generates calendar events for each selected day in the date range.

effective_date_dialog.description: When editing class with schedule changes, 'Schedule Change Detected' dialog appears asking for effective date. Events before that date preserved, events from that date regenerated.

schedule_string_display.description: Classes table shows schedule as 'Mon, Wed, Fri 10:00 AM-11:30 AM' format with day names and times.

duration_auto_calculation.description: Duration (e.g., '1 hour 30 min') auto-calculated from start/end time and displayed in form and table.

calendar_page_events.description: Calendar page shows auto-generated class events. Events properly positioned on correct days (Mon, Wed, Fri, Tue, etc.).

delete_class_deletes_events.description: Deleting a class also deletes all associated calendar events. Toast shows 'Class and associated events deleted successfully'.

critical_code_review_comments: Classes.js: Well-implemented schedule UI with proper data-testid attributes for all form elements
server.py: generate_class_events helper function correctly handles day mapping and date iteration
Backend properly supports effective_date for partial event regeneration on schedule updates
Backwards compatibility maintained - classes without schedule_details still work
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed classes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Class Schedule system fully tested. Key data-testid attributes: add-class-button, class-name-input, class-subject-input, class-type-select, class-fee-input, day-checkbox-{mon,tue,wed,thu,fri,sat,sun}, class-start-time, class-end-time, class-start-date, class-end-date, class-submit-button, effective-date-input, confirm-effective-date. Backend endpoints tested: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/classes, POST /api/classes/{id}/regenerate-events. Auto-event generation verified with proper date range iteration.
